title: Symbolism in Ep08
wikitext:
[]: Symbolism in Ep08             Quote Post by Orgeston » Thu Dec 31, 2015 6:21 pm Notice that the tarp is almost the same color as Asuka's dress. Earlier in the episode when her dress was lifted by the wind I believe that they were setting up this scene in the viewer's minds. Now, symbolically, I believe she is "lifting her skirt", the beginning of her inviting Shinji into her EVA's core, or her womb.

[]: Re: Symbolism in Ep08             Quote Post by Orgeston » Thu Dec 31, 2015 6:26 pm Also, different topic, Israfel looks like a pair of female genitalia, with their heads as the clitorises. I'm sure that's probably already been said.

[]: Re: Symbolism in Ep08             Quote Post by Moap » Fri Jan 01, 2016 1:18 am That's an interesting theory, it's possible- but would sort of contrast the scene in the same episode of them in the stairs when Shinji accidentally peeks at Asuka, and she yells at him and calls him a pervert. Of course Asuka does show off her body to Shinji multiple times to get his attention in later episodes, and what Asuka says she often doesn't entirely mean. Another scene you might be interested is in ep15 when Shinji and Asuka kiss, Shinji pulls back with a look of release, then Asuka goes to clean her mouth out in the bathroom. I guess she doesn't swallow. And yeah I guess at certain angles israfel does look like a pair of vaginas. Lots of Angels in Eva have sexual undertones and symbology, Chuckman talks about a few of them in thread/15461/Neon-Genesis-Evangelion-is-an-Occult-Grimoire/ A couple others Ive noticed are Ramiel's drill is a dick(atleast in NGE, big throbbing extendable pink drill penetrates tokyo-3), and Sandalphon is also vagina(A fish with a gaping maw).

[]: Re: Symbolism in Ep08             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jan 01, 2016 1:17 pm This thread might come in handy: post/441982/Your-Favorite-Yoni

[]: Re: Symbolism in Ep08             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Jan 01, 2016 2:24 pm Evangelion. Where even the Fan Service is 3deep5me. In all honesty though, nice catch!

[]: Re: Symbolism in Ep08             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jan 01, 2016 2:45 pm robersora wrote: Evangelion. Where even the Fan Service is 3deep5me.

[]: Re: Symbolism in Ep08             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Jan 01, 2016 4:13 pm Huh. interesting idea.

[]: Re: Symbolism in Ep08             Quote Post by Chuckman » Tue Jan 05, 2016 11:49 pm I like you.
